{{Quote|The attack on Ryvellia came as a shock to everyone here.|[[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Cracken]], to [[Cryle Cavv]]|<ref name="Small Favors">{{JournalCite|12|Small Favors}}</ref>}}
'''Ryvellia''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Avhn-Bendara system]]. Its capital city, [[V'eldalv]], was the site of a brutal [[Ryvellia uprising|uprising]] that was crushed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] via [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|orbital bombardment]].<ref name="OoaK" /><ref name="TCSWE" />
